description: CSI-native labels for SEAL 0–4. Used in CSI/LMIC display only; EU-CSF mode uses 'SEAL'. The numeric mapping to SEAL is 1:1; only the label changes. Per DR-P0.

labels.description: Foundational jurisdictional anchoring achieved — provider and data governed under an acceptable legal framework.
Data sovereignty and access controls in place — residency, compelled-access protection, and personnel controls met.
Digital resilience and operational independence — supply chain, reversibility, and incident response controls met.
Full digital sovereignty posture — all controls met including additional criteria.
